title: danthonia purpurea
intro: Danthonia purpurea, also known as purple oatgrass or purple oat, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce fever, and calm digestive issues. The health benefits of Danthonia purpurea include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for a range of health issues. Danthonia purpurea can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and provide additional health benefits.
